summary: Reviewed the hydrated live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical is appropriate. Four seed PRs should stay open for maintainer or technical judgment: two maintainer-owned draft/runtime hardening PRs, one contributor TUI queue-mode PR tied to an open source issue, and one LaunchAgent restart PR tied to open issues but with a failing real-behavior proof. Validator security gating requires #89089 to be routed to central security handling. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise action is permitted or justified by this job.
